description_long: This is a crumpled, empty aluminum can with a yellow and orange color scheme and a retro-style label. The can features bold, dark script text and a crown emblem, with nutritional information and a barcode visible on the back. The top of the can is open and appears crushed, with jagged, uneven edges and a darkened interior. The label includes both large, decorative typography and smaller, detailed text, giving it a vintage soda or beer appearance. The surface of the can is slightly reflective, with a metallic sheen and some visible wear and tear. The overall shape is cylindrical, with a standard beverage can size and proportions.
description: A crumpled, open yellow aluminum can with retro-style script and a crown emblem, featuring a metallic sheen and visible label details.
description_view_0: The back of the can shows a barcode, recycling symbol, and small text, with the crushed top and yellow patterned background visible.
description_view_1: The front displays bold script text, a crown emblem, and the word 'Appelsin' in orange, with the crushed top clearly visible.
description_view_2: The side view highlights nutritional information in a vertical list and part of the main label text, with the can's crumpled top.
description_view_3: This view shows the '330ml' volume marking, main label text, and nutritional details, with the crushed top and yellow background.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a yellow patterned background with bold, dark script typography and a crown emblem. The design uses a retro style with orange accent text and detailed nutritional and barcode information.
